description: Market-specific brand rules stored in P3 episodic memory at system bootstrap

rules.value: Do not use 'significantly reduces blood sugar' — MLR rejected 2024-Q3. Use approved claim: 'reduced HbA1c by 1.4% from baseline'
Every efficacy claim must be paired with GI adverse reaction profile (nausea up to 20%) and thyroid C-cell tumor boxed warning
Use 'gut verträglich' for tolerability. Never use informal du-form. Always cite klinische Studie reference number.
Never use 'cure' or 'curative' for KEYTRUDA. Use 'treatment' or 'therapy'. MLR standing rejection since 2022.
Always specify PD-L1 expression requirement (TPS ≥1% or CPS ≥1) when claiming efficacy for NSCLC or HNSCC indications
HUMIRA now faces biosimilar competition (Hadlima, Cyltezo, Hyrimoz). Do not claim HUMIRA is 'the only' anti-TNF option. Always acknowledge biosimilar availability.
For HUMIRA in Germany: use 'gut verträglich' for tolerability. Preferred term for injection site reaction: 'Reaktionen an der Injektionsstelle'
In India market: reference AbbVie patient assistance program. HUMIRA citrate-free formulation preferred for injection site comfort messaging.
